channel.title: KoreShield Status Feed
channel.description: Resolved incidents and scheduled maintenance for KoreShield.

item.title: Resolved: Short-lived checkout initialization errors
item.description: A billing catalog mismatch briefly affected checkout initialization for one hosted plan combination. Fallback handling was deployed and checkout creation recovered.

item.title: Resolved: Delayed document ingestion in the RAG scanner
item.description: Uploaded PDF and DOCX parsing slowed down for a subset of dashboard uploads. Parser loading was optimized and normal processing resumed.

item.title: Scheduled: Datastore maintenance
item.description: Routine PostgreSQL indexing and Redis memory tuning. Expected customer impact is under 5 minutes.
